title: Special Assistant to the President
description:
Job Description

This is a high-impact opportunity to support the President of Climate Solutions AME and the AME leadership team in executing the organization's strategic vision and driving revenue growth. The Special Assistant will play a pivotal role in enabling leadership effectiveness, fostering cross-functional collaboration, and building business acumen through exposure to strategic decision-making and enterprise-wide initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

Executive Support & Strategic Advisory

  • Serve as the primary liaison between the President and key stakeholders, ensuring clarity, alignment, and timely execution of priorities.
  • Provide strategic counsel and thought leadership on key decisions, initiatives, and organizational challenges.

Leadership Team Enablement

Own and manage leadership team rhythms, including meeting agendas, action tracking, and follow-through.
Coordinate development of executive briefings, board presentations, and internal town hall materials.

Oversee annual goal alignment process for the leadership team
Program & Project Management

Drive cross-functional strategic initiatives, including long-range planning (LRP), digital transformation, and connected ecosystem programs.

Define deliverables, timelines, and ownership across strategic projects and ensure accountability.

Monitor KPIs and business performance metrics to inform decision-making and course correction.

Stakeholder Engagement & Communication
Develop and refine executive-level communications for internal and external audiences, including Carrier Board, ELT, and key customer events.
Facilitate collaboration across departments and ensure consistent messaging and alignment.
Coordinate presentation development and polish for major events and customer visits.

Competitive Intelligence & Investor Relations
Track and analyze competitor earnings releases, extracting key insights to inform strategic decisions
Coordinate timely responses to investor relations requests, ensuring alignment with corporate messaging and leadership priorities.

Required Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Finance, Management.
8+ years of progressive experience in finance, strategic planning, business development, or product management
3+ years of experience with exceptional written and verbal communication skills, including executive presentation development
3+ years of experience with strong analytical acumen and strategic thinking capabilities.
3+ years of experience in demonstrated skills in storyboarding and presentation development.

Preferred Qualifications
MBA or any post-graduate degree.
Proven ability to lead complex projects and influence senior stakeholders.
Familiarity with Carrier’s organizational structure, products, and strategic priorities.
Experience in functional areas such as Strategy, Finance, Engineering, or Supply Chain.
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, matrixed environment with competing priorities.
Strong desire for cross-functional exposure and leadership development.

postedCompany.description:
THE INVENTION THAT CHANGED THE WORLD 

In 1902, Willis Carrier solved one of mankind’s most elusive challenges by controlling the indoor environment through modern air conditioning. His invention enabled countless industries, promoting global productivity, health and personal comfort.

Today, Carrier innovations are found across the globe and in virtually every facet of daily life. We create comfortable and productive environments, regardless of the climate. We safeguard the global food supply by preserving the quality and freshness of food and beverages. We ensure health and well-being by enabling the proper transport and delivery of vital medical supplies under exacting conditions. We provide solutions, services and education to lead the green building movement.

These mark just a handful of the ways that Carrier works to make the world a better place to live, work and play.

NATURAL LEADERSHIP

From the very beginning, Carrier has been a natural leader. Not simply for the fact that we created an entirely new and innovative product, but because as we did so, we set the standard in environmental responsibility. Since 1994, we have led the industry in the phase-out of ozone-depleting refrigerants while introducing many of the world’s most energy-efficient heating, air-conditioning and refrigeration systems.

Preservation of the environment and protecting our world’s finite natural resources is a central tenet of our business. We recognize the vital importance of maintaining a responsible balance between the comfort we create today and the world we live in tomorrow.
postedCompany.name: CARRIER SINGAPORE (PTE) LIMITED
